metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1166
metadata.comment:
Rationale: In this study, Belizaire et al. performed subcellular fraction of mouse brain to investigate the localization of synaptogyrin 3. Immunoblot analysis of equivalent amounts of protein showed an enrichment of synaptogyrin 3 in the synaptic vesicle fraction (LP2, Fig. 2, lane 5). As a positive control, fractionation samples were also blotted for the synaptic vesicle proteins synaptogyrin 1 and synaptophysin. Both of these proteins were also enriched in the LP2 fraction. Also, the authors performed immunocytochemistry on cultured hippocampal neurons and investigate the co-localization of synaptogyrin 3 with SV2 protein as synaptic vesicle marker. A high degree of colocalization was observed between the two proteins (Fig. 4). Moreover, in the peripheral nervous system synaptogyrin 3 was enriched in neuromuscular junctions (Fig. 5)

5/2/2018 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Mouse brain fractionation was performed as previously described (Huttner et al., 1983; Janz et al., 1998).
